name: Greek Pork Pita Pockets
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless pork loin, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork into thin strips.
2. Combine olive oil, lemon juice, prepared mustard, minced garlic, and oregano in a bowl.
3. Pour the marinade over the pork strips, ensuring they are well coated.
4. Refrigerate for 1-8 hours to allow flavors to develop.
5. In another bowl, stir together yogurt, chopped cucumber, crushed garlic, and dill weed.
6. Cover and refrigerate this mixture as well.
7. Remove the pork from the marinade, reserving it for later use.
8. Stir-fry the pork strips in a non-stick pan over medium heat for 2-3 minutes until cooked through but still tender.
9. Open the pita breads to form pockets.
10. Add a lettuce leaf to each pocket.
11. Fill with the stir-fried pork strips.
12. Top with cucumber mixture and garnish with chopped red onion.
